claim: Project Telos has a tenth-wave cross-domain experiment-router package that captures 39 arXiv source leads across five lanes, classifies them with a source-router demotion gate, verifies six package-boundary claims in Crucible, and preserves explicit boundaries against quantum, climate, materials, neuroscience, theorem-replay, hardware, wet-lab, and exhaustive-literature overclaims.
scope: Local tenth-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is not a scientific result, theorem replay, quantum hardware validation, climate-model validation, materials discovery, neuroscience truth, wet-lab result, official submission, or exhaustive literature review.
